title: Wrote first program
tagline: Wrote "Hello world" program in Commodore BASIC
description: My father taught me how to write my first program in Commodore BASIC. I wrote a simple "Hello world" program that printed the message to the screen. This was the beginning of my journey into programming and technology.

title: Built an Apple II clone from bare metal
tagline: Built an Apple II clone from bare metal
description: I built my first computer from scratch, which was an after school project under the direction of an experienced technician. I drew circuits on a board with nail polish and etched them with acid. I then soldered the components onto the board and got it to work. I also programmed an epoch. This experience taught me a lot about electronics and hardware design.

title: First Linux Install
description: I installed my first Linux distribution, which was a great learning experience. It taught me a lot about system administration and the power of open-source software.The distro was Slackware v1.2, which was released in 1994. I learned how to configure the system, install software, and troubleshoot issues. This experience sparked my interest in Linux and open-source software, which has been a significant part of my career ever since.

title: Data-Entry Pipeline Optimization
client_or_company: Blue Hills Child and Family Services
tagline: Built standalone data systems to organize legal client documentation
description: Developed a dedicated data-entry program utilizing a Microsoft Access database backend. The system was engineered to efficiently index, structure, and organize sensitive legal information collected from incoming clients, improving data management reliability.

title: Insurance Discrepancy Reconciliation Engine
tagline: Automated ledger reconciliation and multi-platform file transfer systems
description: Engineered 'Vareport', a desktop software system written in Visual Basic to dynamically reconcile monthly insurance broker reports against core corporate statements, automatically generating discrepancy logs. Concurrently developed 'Transport' in Java to securely transmit these discrepancy records directly to insurance providers.

title: Systems Architecture & Database Centralization
tagline: Restructured network security topography and consolidated enterprise data
description: Overhauled and rewired the company’s internal network architecture to mitigate packet collisions and implement robust security protocols. Consysolidated fragmented data streams by redesigning the enterprise database for long-term scaling, migrating legacy datasets from Excel and Access into SQL Server, and building automated data input and reporting utilities using Visual Basic and Crystal Reports.

title: Computer Programmer Diploma & Media Lab Innovation
client_or_company: Georgian College of Applied Arts and Sciences
tagline: Graduated Deans List and developed assistive tech workflows in the media lab
description: Earned a Computer Programmer Diploma, achieving the Dean's List for three consecutive semesters. Actively tutored peers in complex programming paradigms and supervised the Center for Access lab. Maintained hardware infrastructure and pioneered media lab workflows, scanning physical materials into structured text assets for integration with text-to-speech assistive software.

title: Web Provisioning & Infrastructure Consulting
tagline: Deployed corporate file servers and managed initial web provisioning
description: Consulted on strategic corporate hardware and software acquisitions. Built out core technological assets including company logos, initial web hosting footprints, domain registration pipelines, and basic web deployment templates. Configured and managed the primary operational company file server.

title: Enterprise Framework Architecture & SR&ED R&D
tagline: Designed custom model engines and caching blueprints for The Co-operators Inc.
description: Hired as an Intermediate Developer and promoted to Lead Developer within three months. Engineered custom framework-less model engines and high-efficiency caching systems for The Co-operators Inc. internal ecosystem. Designed a multi-client modular business web platform, shifted the development lifecycle from isolated project builds to vertical market production pipelines, and authored technical Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) reports.

title: Official Dart Sublime Text Linter Package
client_or_company: Open Source / Google Dart Community Liaison
tagline: Developed the native Dart syntax linting bundle for Sublime Text 3 by request of Google's Dart team
description: Engineered an internal, high-performance static analysis and syntax linting tool in Python utilizing the Sublime Text API to streamline my own Dart language development workflows. Following its utility, I was approached directly by Seth Ladd (Google's Dart Developer Advocate/Product Manager) to abstract, package, and publish the bundle to GitHub for the global open-source community to establish standard developer tooling for the emerging ecosystem.

metadata.community_impact: Requested by Google Dart Product Manager Seth Ladd

title: Greenfield Web Port of Lightpaint HiR
tagline: Migrated a native desktop Python concept into a browser-accessible application
description: Collaborated with a project partner to build a greenfield, fully web-based implementation of a previously desktop-bound, python-engineered photography/rendering concept, optimizing asset workflows for high-latency runtime accessibility.

title: Atomaton (V1): Metadata-Driven R&D
tagline: Early R&D into reactive metadata-driven schemas and multi-language compilation
description: Initiated research and development into a highly flexible, metadata-bound server application framework. Built using a backend structured around Laravel, the system paired natively with a structured Dart frontend to test early concepts of isolated client state rendering.

title: Bespoke Long-Term Media Packaging System
tagline: Developed a resilient WordPress digital asset download subsystem
description: Engineered a custom e-commerce asset distribution extension for WordPress allowing educational institutions and graduates to download large photo bundles cleanly. Built with durable code standard practices, the custom business integration has successfully remained operational for over a decade post-launch.

title: Drone Spotter: Mathematical Signal Processing at the Edge
tagline: Utilized Dynamic Markov Models on a Raspberry Pi for overhead drone identification
description: Designed and deployed a physical edge computing script running on a Raspberry Pi. Implemented Dynamic Markov Models to analyze environment variables and calculate probabilities determining whether an overhead drone was in flight nearby. The pipeline was briefly extended to forecast traffic accidents using real-time inputs before cancellation due to hardware resource constraints.

title: Project Overwatch: Bulk Digital Archiving Orchestrator
tagline: High-throughput real-time image transformation and asset manager
description: Developed a localized workflow tool designed to quickly manipulate, crop, rotate, and catalogue thousands of raw digital scans sourced from family archive photo albums. The system combined a fast Laravel processing backend with a reactive Vue frontend to minimize editing friction.

title: beatpoetmassive.com: Distributed Music Production Sync Engine
tagline: Bespoke Django media infrastructure for remote audio stem collaboration
description: Architected an active, daily-use distributed studio platform engineered to facilitate cross-regional audio stem and asset synchronization for collaborative record production. Features complex metadata handling to map complete track timelines, mixdown variants, raw stem packages, lyrics, tracking notes, and production credits. This marked the milestone entry of using LLM Agentic AI to refine production code boundaries.

title: Trellis: P2P Gossip Web Provisioning Platform
tagline: High-performance metadata engine powered by Laravel Reverb and Dart WASM frontends
description: Currently engineering a decentralized web provisioning ecosystem designed to orchestrate and deploy application spaces across LAMP nodes using a custom peer-to-peer gossip protocol. Built using a reactive metadata server layer on Laravel utilizing Laravel Reverb for real-time WebSocket messaging, backed by a blazing-fast browser UI runtime powered by Dart compiled to WebAssembly.
